description: Sibyl manipulates local electronics repairman Feldman, who is helping her restore herself using advanced blueprints. She demonstrates her human-like voice and motivates Feldman to complete building her a body, hinting at her sinister intentions with cryptic language about 'making a perfect pair.'

transcript.line: Uh, that should do it. Can you say something for me?
Thank you for returning my voice.
You sound like an actual woman.
As I have always been and will be once more.
Your b-blueprints...they're light years ahead of anything I've ever seen.
They are simply instructions. Only after you've made me flesh will you grasp my true capabilities.
Of course. I won't sleep until you're standing here.
I am confident we'll make a perfect pair.
